last_refresh_reason: Revalidated after stack no-wallet policy repair, G0 evidence repair, runtime wait-threshold hardening, and fresh public runtime audit.
fresh_user_hero_path: Playwright runtime case 'kill write restore receipt' runs in fresh browser contexts, clicks Kill Agent, writes Walrus Memory Will, restores successor, inspects proof, screenshots success, and reloads the receipt.
public_access: Guest public access with no login: /api/workspace/init issues an anonymous owner session cookie and a public visitor can complete the hero path without builder browser state.
reset_or_seed_strategy: Each fresh runtime context creates an isolated owner session, workspace id, task id, checkpoint id, and will id; Start New Run creates a new owner-scoped run while prior receipts remain reopenable.
abuse_limits: P0 keeps a small per-session guided task, caps model output tokens, writes one compact Walrus payload per will, and blocks restore until a pointer exists to limit provider and storage cost.
second_context_or_role_proof: Runtime case 'receipt reopen second context' opens /?will=latest from a second browser context, inspects proof, and the first case switches Finance to Legal role to create distinct live outputs.
support_contact_or_failure_state: No-success banner names the provider, Walrus, or receipt failure and exposes Start New Run retry; restore and write APIs return noSuccess JSON instead of success when dependencies fail.
